title: AI-Powered LinkedIn Content Platform
description: Sole DRF backend developer for a production AI-powered LinkedIn content platform. Built 7 microservices and 60+ REST endpoints supporting 1,000+ concurrent users. Features include versioned prompt management across 6 AI pipelines (n8n), multi-tier profile extraction (LinkedIn API → scraper → OpenAI fallback) at ~95% completion rate, WebSocket notifications via Django Channels at 10K+ daily updates with <100ms latency, Stripe subscriptions with 99.9% payment success, and semantic search using Gemini embeddings + pgvector at <50ms query latency.

title: AI-Driven Cryptocurrency Intelligence Platform
description: Architected a complete real-time intelligence system as sole engineer, processing 100+ social mentions hourly using Google Gemini embeddings and pgvector semantic search. Built async blockchain analysis microservices across 6 networks with token-bucket rate limiting (80%+ cache hits) and automated fraud detection using ML-based DEX scam token detection at 92% accuracy. Established CI/CD orchestrating 10 microservices with automated deployments.

title: Enterprise AI/ML Pipeline Integration
description: Collaborated in a 7-member team integrating MindsDB and Databricks for enterprise AI workflows. Developed APIs connecting Slack and enterprise systems via OAuth 2.0. Optimized PostgreSQL schemas reducing query latency by 30%. Enhanced logging and monitoring systems, reducing support tickets by 25%.

title: Enterprise HRMS Migration & Automation
description: Migrated a legacy HRMS to Django with full-stack ownership, serving 200+ employees. Built attendance, contract, and payroll modules. Implemented ZKTeco biometric sync (Web API), designed multi-device biometric schema, and built monthly/day worksheet reporting endpoints. Deployed Dockerized system on DigitalOcean with Nginx, automated rollback, and performance optimizations. Achieved 99.8% uptime with rolling updates and cut onboarding time from 4 hours to 30 minutes.

title: Drone Swarm Control System
description: Led a team of 4 building a QGroundControl-based drone swarm controller supporting 10+ UAVs with 50Hz telemetry. Enhanced custom ground control using Qt with custom UI features. Optimized drone swarm control with multiprocessing and real-time telemetry with multithreading. Built Gazebo SITL multi-drone simulation, high-throughput MQTT telemetry pipeline at 10K msg/sec with <20ms latency, and custom mission planning tools reducing planning time by 60%. Dockerized CI/CD workflows and managed isolated environments with Vagrant.

title: Python Ground Control & Video Processing
description: Transitioned drone ground control to Olympe and Sphinx, integrating telemetry with multiprocessing and MQTT. Developed video streaming from Sphinx to Android apps enabling real-time object detection via OpenCV. Enhanced navigation using OpenStreetMap in Android ground stations. Designed responsive features like video overlays and live telemetry visualization.

title: AWS Automation & Cloud Deployment
description: Automated AWS infrastructure provisioning with Boto3, including VPCs, EC2, and ECS services. Deployed Flask apps on ECS with Docker and ensured public access using Dynu DDNS. Streamlined modular deployments and delivered scalable, end-to-end cloud solutions.

title: Cardiovascular Age Prediction — Published Research
description: End-to-end ML pipeline for cardiovascular age prediction. Collected ECG data from 42 subjects using ESP32 + AD8232, producing 6,131 segments with 13 features. Trained Random Forest (R²=0.99) and ResNet-18 transfer learning models (R²=0.87). Published in Circuits, Systems, and Signal Processing (CSSP) journal, Nov 2024.

title: AI Prompt Management Platform
description: Django platform integrating OpenAI GPT-4 with streaming responses for prompt versioning, RBAC access control, and secure S3 asset storage. Built at VeritusLabs for internal AI workflow management.

title: Distributed Job Scheduler
description: TCP/IP distributed scheduler in C with Pthread concurrency supporting 50+ simultaneous jobs. Implements process isolation via Fork/Exec for safe parallel execution.

title: Real-Time Pub-Sub Messaging System
description: Scalable publisher-subscriber system with Redis in-memory caching and PostgreSQL persistence. Supports 1K+ msg/sec with Node.js backend and delivery acknowledgments.

title: Endless Runner Mobile Game
description: Multi-level endless runner for Android built in Unity/C# using object pooling techniques reducing memory usage by 40%. Implemented advanced mechanics like level progression, power-ups, and dynamic obstacles. Integrated Google Play Services for leaderboards and achievements. Achieved 5K+ downloads with 4.2★ rating.

title: Endless Runner Web Game
description: Web-based endless runner game built with PlayCanvas and JavaScript. Optimized gameplay with scene pre-loading, object pooling, and reusable assets to minimize load times. Enhanced user engagement through asynchronous signals and optimized rendering to reduce latency. Designed scalable game architecture allowing easy expansion with new levels and features.

title: Personal Portfolio — mubashir-rehman.is-a.dev
description: Fully static personal portfolio built with React 18, TypeScript, and Vite — SSG-rendered via vite-react-ssg for zero JS-required page loads and instant navigation. Features 8 pages (Landing, About, Projects, Hobbies, Habits, Journal, Contact, 404), a custom 3-theme system (Sakura / Dark / Light) with animated cherry blossom SVG scene, GitHub-style habit heatmap with year-select, a markdown-rendered journal with Giscus comment threads, animated counters with Framer Motion page transitions, and full SEO with react-helmet-async, JSON-LD structured data, Open Graph tags, and a static sitemap. Deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions CI/CD with SSG pre-rendering of all routes. Includes a fetch monkey-patch guard to handle stale bundle/manifest hash mismatches on redeploy without crashing.
